name: Vegetable Stock
recipeIngredient: 1 large leek, halved lengthwise with half the green part removed
1 whole head of garlic, unpeeled but crushed
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the leek, potatoes, carrots, celery, and zucchini into 1-inch pieces.
2. In a large stockpot, combine all the ingredients and add water until it is six inches above the top of the vegetables. Bring to a boil.
3. Remove from heat, uncover, and reduce for one hour.
4. Return to heat, cover, and simmer for another hour, skimming the surface if necessary.
5. Remove the cover and continue simmering for 45 minutes more.
6. Strain the stock through a fine-mesh sieve, pressing on the vegetables with a spoon to release their flavor.
7. Discard the solids or use them for compost.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
